description: Headline, subheadline, and CTA copy templates organized by persuasion strategy. Use {placeholders} for business-specific data.

problem_solution_headlines.description: Headlines that name a problem the customer has, then position the business as the solution.
templates: Finally, a {industry} in {city} you can trust.
Say goodbye to {pain_point}. Say hello to {business_name}.

social_proof_headlines.description: Headlines that lead with credibility — ratings, reviews, years of experience.
templates: Trusted by {city} families for over {years} years.

benefit_driven_headlines.description: Headlines focused on the outcome or transformation the customer will experience.
templates: A smile you'll be proud of — guaranteed.
Your home, transformed. Your life, simplified.
Look your best. Feel your best. Be your best.
The {cuisine} experience your taste buds deserve.
Professional results. Personal attention. Fair prices.

location_authority_headlines.description: Headlines that establish local authority and community connection.

subheadlines.description: Supporting lines that add detail, credibility, or emotion below the main headline.
templates: Family-owned and operated — treating every customer like family.
Licensed, insured, and backed by {review_count}+ five-star reviews.
Free estimates. No surprises. Just great {service_type}.
Book online in 30 seconds or call us at {phone}.
Fresh ingredients. Authentic recipes. Unforgettable flavors.
From consultation to completion — we handle everything.

urgency_ctas.description: CTA copy that creates urgency or scarcity to drive immediate action.
templates: Get your free quote before they fill up.
Don't wait — call now for priority service.

trust_building_ctas.description: CTA copy that reduces risk and builds confidence in taking action.
templates: See our work — no commitment required.
Talk to an expert — it's free.

direct_action_ctas.description: Simple, direct CTA buttons that tell the user exactly what to do.

about_section_openers.description: Opening lines for the About section that tell the business story.
templates: For over {years} years, {business_name} has been {city}'s trusted {industry}.
What started as a small {origin_story} has grown into {city}'s favorite {industry}.
Founded in {year}, {business_name} was born from a simple idea: {mission}.
We're not just another {industry}. We're your neighbors, your friends, your {relationship}.
Every {service_type} we deliver is backed by {years} years of experience and a commitment to excellence.
